name: semantic-forge
description: Semantic model workbench — OpenUI5, SAP CAP, OData V4

scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && npx cds deploy --to sqlite && npm run build --workspace=@semantic-forge/ui5 && cds watch --port 4004
scripts.test:domain: npm run test --workspace=@semantic-forge/domain && npm run test --workspace=@semantic-forge/validation-engine
scripts.test:integration: cds deploy --to sqlite && node --import tsx --test test/integration/**/*.test.ts
scripts.test: npm run build:packages && npm run test:domain && npm run test:integration
